title: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Dry Bulk Report - December 5, 2023
section_path: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Dry Bulk Report - December 5, 2023
section_path_text: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Dry Bulk Report - December 5, 2023
summary:
Main
· Dry bulk rates surge at an unprecedented speed leaving traders stunned; Where do we go next? - The dry bulk market never fails to impress, and the past fortnight is a great example: Spot rates across all asset classes staged an extraordinary rally , at times with an intensity not seen since the supercyle of the 2007-2008 era. A clear tightness in the availability of ships in the Atlantic has been the main reason that fueled the rally but demand has also been very strong with iron ore and bauxite cargoes appearing daily in the market, further boosting confidence amongst owners and leaving charterers scrambling for open vessels.
